products.name: Remote Drone Docking Station
products.descriptor: Autonomous drone docking station with self-charging for 24/7 drone operations

evidence.snippet:
*   Weather-resistant drone docking stations with autonomous charging
*   Secure data transmission and remote command access
*   [Remote Drone Docking Station](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/remote-drone-docking-station/)

products.name: Surveillance Drones
products.descriptor: Aerial drone surveillance service with HD video streaming and autonomous patrol

evidence.snippet: Our [surveillance drones](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/surveillance-drones/) offer rapid deployment, live HD video streaming, and intelligent tracking. They are perfect for wide-area and hard-to-reach security coverage. Supported by autonomous drone docking stations, these units ensure 24/7 protection with minimal manual intervention.

### [Surveillance Drones](/security-technology/drone-security-system/)
High-tech aerial surveillance with security drones for real-time monitoring of wide areas, enhancing threat detection and rapid response.

evidence.snippet:
### [Sentinel Surveillance](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/sentinel-surveillance-services/)
Portable 360-degree surveillance units designed to monitor construction sites, industrial complexes, and critical infrastructures.

products.name: Mobile Surveillance Trailers Rental

evidence.snippet:
Cybersecurity Services
======================
Defend against digital threats that could disrupt your business’s operations with our specialized cybersecurity services and solutions.

We at [American Security Force](/) are well-versed in various operating systems, networks, and databases. We work with just about any technology that a small to mid-size business would encounter. We use this expertise to help clients with small to mid-sized cybersecurity projects.

unresolved_questions: All 14 prioritized products were located and recorded, but product-specific detail pages for most items were skipped (status: skipped_class_budget). Descriptions and classifications rely primarily on the homepage (resource-0001) and two capability pages (resource-0003 video monitoring, resource-0004 electronic access control). Drone-specific details (model names, sensor specs, payload capacity) remain unknown.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance claims were found in any fetched page.

Remote Surveillance (service page) and Surveillance Drones (product page) overlap in scope — the site treats these as distinct offerings but the corpus does not contain their individual detail pages to confirm differentiation.

fetch_requests.reason: Primary drone product page — would confirm drone model names, specs, and any NDAA/Blue UAS claims

Sentinel surveillance tower detail page — would clarify product specs and whether it is a tower product or service
Mobile surveillance trailer detail page — would confirm specs, rental vs. purchase model, and any compliance claims
